entities.name: Evolution Log
entities.context: a log for recording the evolution of data or concepts

relationships.context: edges.db is utilized by Pattern Surfacer
Pattern Surfacer uses Resonance Index for pattern extraction
Resonance Index utilizes Contextual Primer for context establishment
Contextual Primer supports B33 Extraction Prompt for information extraction
B33 Extraction Prompt generates New Edges
New Edges are tracked by Evolution Tracker
Evolution Tracker records information in Evolution Log
